# Vendored vscode-textmate conformance corpus

Source: https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-textmate (MIT License)
Commit: 82c77622ed41b4391df87f90b55a1a13debd7779
Vendored dirs: test-cases/first-mate, test-cases/suite1

These are upstream's own tokenization conformance fixtures + expected outputs,
used here to verify textmate-grammar-tree against the real vscode-textmate engine
(same approach as the Luau conformance suite).
